$comment: MERCH — things Caitlin actually SELLS (as opposed to affiliate links she earns commission on).
Checkout is a Stripe Payment Link. No monthly fee, and Stripe's 'custom fields' let the
buyer type their initials at checkout — which is the whole point for the monogrammed items.
Why not Shopify: its Buy Button cannot collect line-item properties at all (open issue #598),
so it physically cannot do a personalised tote. It's also $39/mo. Both disqualifying.
NOT IN HERE, ON PURPOSE — from Caitlin's notes but not actually sellable by her:
HULKEN bags     trademarked brand, wholesale-only, $99+ retail -> affiliate (accessories)
Lipstick cases  not in any print-on-demand catalogue           -> affiliate (accessories)
Clutches        not in any print-on-demand catalogue           -> affiliate (accessories)
HOW CAITLIN ADDS ONE: create the Payment Link in Stripe (add a custom text field called
'Initials' for personalised items), copy the URL, paste it into /admin. See CAITLIN-HOWTO.md.
Items with no stripeUrl show an 'Ask Caitlin' button instead of a Buy button — never a dead one.
